visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair sitting in the driver's seat of a car. He wears a black shirt and has a small earring in his left ear. The background outside the car window is a blur of green, suggesting trees. In the top left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The man is speaking with an intense and animated expression, gesturing emphatically with his right hand, which is near the steering wheel. A man speaks with a loud, agitated, and confrontational tone, his voice filled with indignation and a sense of being wronged. He exclaims, "Face to face and ask me, of course I'd say yes! Do you think I'm really a fool?" His delivery is rapid and forceful, emphasizing his disbelief and frustration. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the man's profile as he continues to speak with a determined look. The shot then cuts to a different man in the passenger seat. He has dark hair and is wearing a black shirt. His right hand, which is bandaged, is held up to his mouth as he looks off-camera with a serious and contemplative expression. The "风行网" text remains in
